action_items: Fix or reconcile https://tooladvisor.eu/functions/proxy: audit expected 405 or 200, but the browser rendered the ToolAdvisor 404 page.
Verify live Content-Security-Policy response headers with a header-capable network check; local _headers contains CSP but this run could not read live headers.
Restore ingestion traceability: 908/908 candidates are missing source_page and raw_row_ref; 112/908 are missing source_file.
Confirm direct availability of /directory-data-extracted.js outside the browser client; it is observed as a catalog script asset but direct navigation was blocked by the client.
